description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a U-shaped layout surrounding a central open courtyard. The exterior features a combination of dark and light roofing, with large windows and sliding glass doors opening onto a backyard patio and swimming pool. The front of the house includes a driveway with two parked cars and a landscaped entryway. The backyard is enclosed with fencing and features a wooden deck, lounge chairs, and a rectangular pool. The house is surrounded by minimalistic landscaping, including trees, shrubs, and grass patches. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story U-shaped house with a central courtyard, large windows, a backyard pool, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, two parked cars, and landscaped entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, white exterior wall, row of shrubs, and the backyard pool area at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, lounge chairs, and large glass doors opening to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, black fencing, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, wide steps, and a modern door with adjacent glass panels and minimalistic landscaping.
